title: PKBD Mosquito Killer Lamp with LED Light, 2-in-1 15W Electric Fly Zapper with 4200V Grid, IPX4 Waterproof Bug Zapper with 3M Cable, UV Light Insect Killer for Home Garden Patio, Silent Fly Catcher
bullet_points: 🌱【Two-in-One: High-Voltage Fly Zapper & Gentle LED Light】: Get rid of pesky insects with our powerful electric fly zapper. It uses a 15W UV-A tube (365nm) to lure mosquitoes, flies, and moths. They're instantly zapped by the 4200V bug zapper grid—no chemicals. Unlike standard fly killer indoor units, this also features a built-in 9W LED light for gentle evening illumination. A proper 2-in-1 solution for your gaff that's practical and energy-saving.

🌱【IPX4 Weatherproof & 3M Cable for Flexible Use Anywhere】: Made for British weather, this mosquito killer lamp is IPX4 rated, so use it worry-free in damp spots or outdoors—rain or shine. Perfect for the kitchen, loo, garden, or patio. The 3-metre cable gives you freedom to position your fly catcher outdoor just right—hang it at ideal height (4-8 feet). Whether you're in a flat with a balcony or a house with a big garden, this bug zapper fits right in.

🌱【Quietly Covers a Massive Area & Won't Keep You Awake】: Enjoy a peaceful, pest-free home with our insect killer. The 360-degree UV light covers up to 150㎡, pulling in flying nasties from all corners. Need reliable fly killers for the home or something for patio barbecues? This unit's spot on. It works in near silence—no loud zaps to disrupt telly or sleep. This mosquito and flies killer trap lets you enjoy a good night's kip without buzzing interruptions.

🌱【Easy to Clean & Long-Life Bulb That's a Breeze to Replace】: Nobody wants a faff to clean. This electric fly killers for the home has a twist-off bottom tray, making it dead easy to empty out the dead insect rubbish. The energy-saving UV bulb lasts up to 9,000 hours. When it needs swapping, it's a doddle to replace—no tools needed. Your trusty plug in fly killer is built for the long haul.

🌱【Eco-Friendly & Child-Safe Design Made from Tough Materials】: Safety first. This fly killer electric is made from flame-retardant ABS material, so it's safe around kids and pets. It's kind to the environment whilst tough enough to last. The insulated electric grid prevents accidental shocks during handling or cleaning. Choose the best fly killer that puts your family's safety first—healthy, safe, and eco-friendly pest control for your home.
